rules.category: Foreign currency spending in designated regions (Japan, South Korea, Thailand, Mainland China, Macau, Taiwan)
rules.note: At physical stores, foreign currency only (HKD-denominated transactions excluded). Includes basic 0.4% +FUN Dollars.
rules.category_zh: 指定地區外幣簽賬（日本、南韓、泰國、中國內地、澳門、台灣）
rules.note_zh: 於實體商戶，只限外幣（港幣結算交易除外）。包括基本0.4% +FUN Dollars。

rules.category: Foreign currency spending in other regions
rules.note: At physical stores, foreign currency only. Online FX spend earns only the basic 0.4%. Includes basic 0.4% +FUN Dollars.
rules.note_zh: 於實體商戶，只限外幣。網上外幣簽賬只享基本0.4%。包括基本0.4% +FUN Dollars。

rules.note: At physical restaurants, excludes online, banquets, private parties/rooms, hotel restaurants, department store food courts, clubhouses. Includes basic 0.4% +FUN Dollars.
rules.note_zh: 於實體餐廳，不包括網上簽賬、宴會、私人派對／房間、酒店餐廳、百貨公司美食廣場、會所。包括基本0.4% +FUN Dollars。

reward_programs.miles_program: RewardCash convertible to 19 frequent flyer/hotel programmes (1 RewardCash = 20 miles preferential rate)

rules.category: Designated everyday, local transport & travel merchants
rules.note: 2.5% RewardCash converted at 1:20. HK-only: cafés & light meals (Starbucks, Pacific Coffee, %Arabica...), local transport (KMB, Citybus, MTR gate fares, taxis, tram, petrol stations, Tesla SuperCharger, carparks, tunnel tolls), cross-border transport, travel services (Klook, kkday, TurboJet...). Unlimited; e-wallet payments excluded.
rules.category_zh: 指定日常、本地交通及旅遊商戶
rules.note_zh: 2.5% RewardCash以1:20兌換。只限香港：咖啡店及輕食（Starbucks、Pacific Coffee、%Arabica等）、本地交通（九巴、城巴、港鐵閘機、的士、電車、油站、Tesla充電、停車場、隧道費）、跨境交通、旅遊服務（Klook、kkday、噴射飛航等）。無上限；電子錢包付款除外。

rules.note: Base rate (1% RewardCash at 1:20), unlimited.
rules.note_zh: 基本回贈（1% RewardCash以1:20兌換），無上限。

rules.rate: HK$5 = 1 mile (HK$2 = 1 mile with registration, Jul–Dec 2026)
rules.note: Standard HK$5=1 mile. Limited-time HK$2=1 mile: 1 Jul–31 Dec 2026 in two phases (Jul–Sep, Oct–Dec); MUST register in Reward+ app BEFORE spending; needs HK$12,000+ net overseas spend per phase; extra RewardCash capped $225/phase ($450 total).
rules.note_zh: 標準HK$5=1里。限時HK$2=1里：2026年7月1日至12月31日分兩階段（7-9月、10-12月）；須先於Reward+應用程式登記方可簽賬；每階段須滿HK$12,000海外淨簽賬；額外RewardCash每階段上限$225（合共$450）。

excludes: transactions via e-wallets at designated merchants
MTR transactions other than gate tapping (e.g., Customer Service Centre, MTR Mobile tickets)

rules.category: Dining (your 最紅自主獎賞 5X category)
rules.note: You registered ✓ and allocated all 5X to DINING: extra 2% + 0.4% base. Applies to the first HK$100,000 eligible spend per year, then 0.4%. Until 31 Aug 2026 the 大折日 bonus stacks on top — see the separate entry below.
rules.category_zh: 餐飲（你的最紅自主獎賞5X類別）
rules.note_zh: 你已登記✓並將全部5X分配至餐飲：額外2% + 基本0.4%。適用於全年首HK$100,000合資格簽賬，其後0.4%。至2026年8月31日前另有大折日獎賞疊加——見下方獨立項目。

rules.note: Base: HK$250 = $1 RewardCash, unlimited.
rules.note_zh: 基本獎賞：每HK$250 = $1獎賞錢，無上限。

rules.note: Your personalized targeted offer (Group 1): once your accumulated eligible spend reaches HK$15,000 (counts local + overseas spend across ALL your HSBC cards, 26 Jun–31 Aug 2026), you earn an EXTRA 3% RewardCash on in-store local dining and overseas spend made after registration. Extra 3% capped at $300 RewardCash for the period; credited by 30 Nov 2026. ⚠️ Must register in the Reward+ app BEFORE spending counts.
rules.category_zh: 最紅大折日：本地餐飲（實體店）
rules.note_zh: 你的特選目標獎賞（第1組）：推廣期內（2026年6月26日至8月31日）累積合資格簽賬達HK$15,000（計及你名下所有滙豐卡的本地+海外簽賬），登記後的實體店本地餐飲及海外簽賬可額外賺3%獎賞錢。額外3%全期上限$300獎賞錢；2026年11月30日前入賬。⚠️ 必須先於Reward+應用程式登記，簽賬方可計算。

rules.category: 最紅大折日: overseas / non-HKD spend
rules.note: Same offer as above applied to overseas (non-HKD) transactions. Shares the HK$15,000 Group-1 target and the $300 RewardCash extra cap.
rules.category_zh: 最紅大折日：海外／非港幣簽賬
rules.note_zh: 同上優惠適用於海外（非港幣）交易。與餐飲共用HK$15,000第1組目標及$300獎賞錢額外上限。

excludes: online transactions (extra 3% is in-store dining + overseas only)
fees, Octopus/e-wallet top-ups, online bill payments, tax, insurance, instalments, casino

rules.note: Jul–Dec 2026 list — Local: Sushiro, TamJai SamGor, TamJai Yunnan, Bakehouse, Decathlon, NAMCO, TAITO STATION, Sephora, @cosme STORE, @cosme HONG KONG, 3COINS. Overseas: FamilyMart (Japan stores), Suica, WOWPASS, Tmoney. GU was REMOVED from 1 Jul 2026. Includes base 0.4%. Cap: $100 RewardCash/month.
rules.note_zh: 2026年7至12月名單——本地：Sushiro、譚仔三哥、譚仔雲南米線、Bakehouse、Decathlon、NAMCO、TAITO STATION、Sephora、@cosme STORE、@cosme HONG KONG、3COINS。海外：FamilyMart（日本分店）、Suica、WOWPASS、Tmoney。GU已於2026年7月1日起剔除。包括基本0.4%。每曆月上限$100獎賞錢。

rules.note: Includes base 0.4% RewardCash. Online spend determined by Mastercard merchant category or acquirer. Cap: $400 RewardCash per calendar month.
rules.note_zh: 包括基本0.4% RewardCash。網上簽賬根據Mastercard商戶類別或收單機構而定。每曆月上限$400 RewardCash。

rules.note: Base: HK$250 = $1 RewardCash, unlimited.
rules.note_zh: 基本獎賞：每HK$250 = $1獎賞錢，無上限。

rules.note: Owner currently earns 1% (salary-credit task not done, no Mox+) — rankings use 1%. 2% needs monthly salary ≥HK$25,000 via FPS (shows as 'Salary') or Mox+; ⚠️ from 1 Sep 2026 the salary route ends and 2% becomes Mox+-members-only.
rules.note_zh: 你現時賺1%（未做出糧任務，亦無Mox+）——排名以1%計算。2%需每月薪金≥HK$25,000經FPS入賬（顯示為「Salary」）或Mox+會籍；⚠️ 2026年9月1日起薪金途徑取消，2%只限Mox+會員。

rules.note: Unlimited, no published end date. MCC-based (supermarkets & grocery stores as classified by Mastercard) — covers HKTVmall, ParknShop, Wellcome, city'super, Don Don Donki, YATA, AEON and more.
rules.note_zh: 無上限，暫無公佈結束日期。以Mastercard商戶類別代碼（MCC）界定超級市場及雜貨店——包括HKTVmall、百佳、惠康、city'super、Don Don Donki、一田、AEON等。

rules.note: Base 1% + extra 1%, renewed for 1 Jul 2026 – 30 Jun 2027. Extra 1% reportedly applies to first HK$150,000/year (HK$1,500 extra cap) — cap structure pending official confirmation (issuer PDF not publicly fetchable). Bonus: extra 2% (up to 4% total) if a single transaction ≥HK$1,500 is put on a 6-month+ instalment plan.
rules.note_zh: 基本1% + 額外1%，已續期至2026年7月1日至2027年6月30日。額外1%據報適用於全年首HK$150,000（額外回贈上限HK$1,500）——上限結構有待官方確認（發卡機構PDF暫無法公開讀取）。加碼：單一簽賬≥HK$1,500並做6個月或以上分期，可額外賺2%（合共最高4%）。

excludes: money transfer/P2P/e-wallet reload/bill payment via e-wallet

rules.note: WeWa gives the extra 3.6% on ONE self-selected category only — yours is Mobile Payment (Apple Pay; UnionPay QuickPass/QR via OmyCard app; Visa mobile pay = iOS/Apple Pay only). Selection is one-time and permanent. Requires HK$1,500/mo eligible retail spend; extra rebate capped HK$200/card/month.
rules.category_zh: 流動支付（你已選擇的類別）
rules.note_zh: WeWa只在「玩樂類別4選1」中你所選的一個類別給予額外3.6%——你選了流動支付（Apple Pay；銀聯QuickPass／QR經OmyCard應用程式；Visa流動支付只限iOS/Apple Pay）。選擇一次性及永久。每月須有HK$1,500合資格零售簽賬；額外回贈每卡每月上限HK$200。

rules.category: All other spending (incl. travel, overseas, online entertainment — NOT selected)
rules.note: Travel, Overseas and Online Entertainment are NOT your selected category, so they earn base 0.4% only. (Corrected 2026-07-03: previously shown wrongly as 3.6% on all four categories.)
rules.category_zh: 所有其他簽賬（包括旅遊、海外、網上娛樂——非已選類別）
rules.note_zh: 旅遊、海外及網上娛樂並非你所選類別，只享基本0.4%。（2026-07-03更正：先前錯誤顯示為四類全部3.6%。）

rules.note: HKD transactions at dining outlets; excludes banquets, hotel restaurants, food courts, supermarkets, department stores, clubs. No cap; odd dollars carry forward monthly. Confirmed for 1 Jan–31 Dec 2026.
rules.note_zh: 於餐飲商戶的港幣交易；不包括宴會、酒店餐廳、美食廣場、超級市場、百貨公司、會所。無上限；餘數每月滾存。已確認適用於2026年1月1日至12月31日。

rules.note: HKD transactions directly at hotels or via official hotel websites; excludes third-party platforms like OTAs. No cap.
rules.note_zh: 直接於酒店或經酒店官方網站進行的港幣交易；不包括第三方平台如OTA。無上限。

rules.note: Non-HKD currency transactions. No cap.
rules.note_zh: 非港幣貨幣交易。無上限。

rules.note: Plus one-off 2,667 bonus miles per promo period on accumulating HK$8,000 Cathay/HKX spend (1 Jul–31 Dec 2026, two phases, bonus earnable once; requires linked Cathay membership).
rules.category_zh: 國泰航空及香港快運簽賬
rules.note_zh: 另加一次性2,667里獎賞：推廣期內累積HK$8,000國泰／香港快運簽賬（2026年7月1日至12月31日，分兩階段，獎賞只可賺一次；須連結國泰會員賬戶）。

rules.note: Base evergreen rate on all other eligible HKD spend, unlimited.
rules.note_zh: 基本長期比率，適用於所有其他合資格港幣簽賬，無上限。

excludes: bill payment (Online Banking, Phone Banking, JET Payment)
non-financial institutions (foreign exchange, money orders, travelers cheques)

rules.note: HKD-posted spend, no cap, no minimum.
rules.note_zh: HKD已入賬簽賬，無上限，無最低要求。

rules.note: non-HKD posted spend, no cap, no minimum.
rules.note_zh: 非HKD已入賬簽賬，無上限，無最低要求。

excludes: transfers/top-ups to e-wallets (Octopus O! ePay, Alipay)
non-financial institutions (foreign currency, money orders, travelers cheques)

rules.note: 5% applies to first HK$5,000 eligible spend at designated merchants per statement cycle (≈HK$250 max/month), then base tier rate. Current merchants: China Mobile HK & s/ash, Circle K, foodpanda, HKTVmall, Klook, McDonald's HK, PARKnSHOP (+eShop), Watsons (+eShop), Sasa. Zero cashback (even at designated merchants) if monthly spend under HK$4,000. Evergreen scheme, no registration.
rules.note_zh: 5%適用於每個月結單週期內指定商戶首HK$5,000合資格簽賬（每月最多約HK$250），其後按基本階梯比率。現時商戶：中國移動香港及s/ash、Circle K（OK便利店）、foodpanda、HKTVmall、Klook、麥當勞、百佳（及eShop）、屈臣氏（及eShop）、莎莎。每月簽賬不足HK$4,000則零回贈（指定商戶亦然）。長期計劃，毋須登記。

rules.note: 0.56% when monthly eligible spending HKD4,000-14,999; 1.20% when HKD15,000+; zero below HKD4,000.
rules.note_zh: 每月合資格消費達 HKD4,000-14,999 可享 0.56%；達 HKD15,000+ 可享 1.20%；不足HKD4,000則零回贈。

rules.note: Requires monthly offline retail spend >= HKD1,000 to unlock. Single transaction net >= HKD500. Includes 0.4% base rebate. Extra rebate capped HK$200/month AND HK$1,000 total for the whole promo period (1 May–30 Sep 2026).
rules.note_zh: 需每月線下零售消費 ≥ HKD1,000 方可解鎖。單一交易淨額 ≥ HKD500。包含0.4%基本回贈。額外回贈每月上限HK$200，及整個推廣期（2026年5月1日至9月30日）合共上限HK$1,000。

rules.note: Citybus (incl. airport routes), KMB, LWB, MTR (tap-to-pay gates only, excl. Airport Express), Hong Kong Tramways, Star Ferry. Requires monthly offline retail spend >= HKD1,000. Includes 0.4% base rebate.
rules.category_zh: 指定本地公共交通工具
rules.note_zh: 城巴（包括機場路線）、九巴、龍運巴士、港鐵（僅限感應式支付閘機，機場快綫除外）、香港電車、天星小輪。需每月線下零售消費 ≥ HKD1,000。包含0.4%基本回贈。

rules.note: Adidas, Fila, PUMA, Matsumoto Kiyoshi, Tokyo Lifestyle (東京生活館). In-store transactions only. Requires monthly offline retail spend >= HKD1,000. Includes 0.4% base rebate.
rules.note_zh: Adidas、Fila、PUMA、松本清、東京生活館。僅限實體店交易。需每月線下零售消費 ≥ HKD1,000。包含0.4%基本回贈。

rules.category: bill payment via sim Credit Card app
rules.note: Excludes payments to Inland Revenue Department. Requires monthly offline retail spend >= HKD1,000. Includes 0.4% base rebate.
rules.category_zh: 透過 sim Credit Card app 繳付賬單
rules.note_zh: 不包括繳付稅務局款項。需每月線下零售消費 ≥ HKD1,000。包含0.4%基本回贈。

rules.note: All other retail transactions not in above categories. Requires monthly offline retail spend >= HKD1,000. Includes base 0.4% rebate.
rules.category_zh: 其他零售消費（本地及海外）
rules.note_zh: 所有不屬上述類別的其他零售交易。需每月線下零售消費 ≥ HKD1,000。包含0.4%基本回贈。
